description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pr that triggers on push to branches matching pull-request/[0-9]+. The workflow has concurrent execution with a cancel-in-progress policy. It consists of multiple jobs including pr-builder, telemetry-setup, check-nightly-ci, changed-files, checks, conda-cpp-build, conda-cpp-tests, conda-python-build, conda-python-tests, docs-build, wheel-build-cpp, wheel-build-python, wheel-tests, devcontainer, and telemetry-summarize. These jobs perform various tasks such as setting up telemetry, checking nightly CI, building and testing conda packages, building wheels, and summarizing telemetry.
